module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout plus prompt-template sources. It organizes agent, client, common, prompt, host, protocol, and tool crates/modules; the agent now routes plan events to PlanHub which reserves step-number blocks and emits StepEvent::Trigger, Step emits PlanEvent::Trigger, protocol StepEvent gained a Trigger variant while PlanEvent renamed Run to Trigger, and the unused StepStatus enum was removed.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step/plan/execution orchestration; PlanHub (renamed from PlanQueue) routes plan events and reserves step-number blocks via TaskState::step_count, Step owns step/plan routing and emits PlanEvent::Trigger, and the execution module's ExecutionHub tracks tool executions keyed by ExecutionSignature, accumulating output and emitting StepEvent::Complete back to the step layer on completion, with TaskState owning that ExecutionHub.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for the marix_client library, ClientSession and signature-aware ClientEvent source, and client binaries including a CLI whose oneshot mode exits on Done completion events; ClientSession creates task signatures with empty names and leaves request text in TaskEvent::Create.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading with serializable System/Platform/Arch re-exports, external adapters including a redb embedded-database wrapper, database telemetry logging via the Logger client over redb and TCP, and structure utilities including WorkQueue::clear for session cleanup.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including no-Model Step kind formats, run_steps Plan output examples, answer-only Initial JSON for no-step requests, and Intent text in the surrounding step description.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: First-class marix-protocol workspace crate for reusable session, task, answer, plan, step, execution, tool, and shared Signature definitions; TaskSignature derives ordering/hashing to key execution and plan maps, PlanEvent renamed its Run variant to Trigger, StepEvent gained a Trigger variant, the unused StepStatus enum was removed, ExecutionUpdate now carries a 0-based seq, and ExecutionStatus::Succeed carries the expected update count.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; executor preview replies send System::new host metadata and tool previews, unknown-tool failures send ExecutionStatus failure events, the per-request ExecutionContext was renamed to ExecutionState, and per-execution updates are now seq-stamped with success reporting the expected update count.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
